goal_text:
You want to book a 'taxi'. The taxi should depart from 'whipple museum of the history of science' and should 'arrive by 21:00'.
The taxi should go to 'restaurant two two'.
Make sure you get 'car type' and 'contact number'.

book.departure: whipple museum of the history of science
